title: eleocharis obtusa var. ovata
intro: Eleocharis obtusa var. ovata, also known as the lesser spikerush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. The lesser spikerush can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
